targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, verified_rate AS value FROM analytics.grounding_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') ORDER BY 1

SELECT bucket AS time, workspace_id::text || ' p50' AS metric, p50 AS value FROM analytics.nli_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') UNION ALL SELECT bucket AS time, workspace_id::text || ' p95' AS metric, p95 AS value FROM analytics.nli_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') ORDER BY 1

SELECT model_or_evaluator AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM analytics.scores WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND name = 'citation_verified' AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT jsonb_array_length(payload #> '{record,citations}') AS citations, count(*) FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 4 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS workspace_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT workspace_id::text FROM analytics.turn_lineage ORDER BY 1
list.label: workspace_id
list.name: workspace_id
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS workspace_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT workspace_id::text FROM analytics.turn_lineage ORDER BY 1
